session_summary: Canvas push fully resolved. WormBot fixed code now lands in debug tab consistently, back to back. Multiple layers of bugs diagnosed and fixed across debug_view.py, canvas_window.py, and chat_engine.py.
completed: canvas push — FULLY WORKING: WormBot fix → code lands in debug tab, new tab opens, consistent back to back

debug_view.py — _sync_scroll: guarded against non-float args (TclError fixed)
debug_view.py — load(): restored correct indentation after sed damage

Fixed code lands in debug tab canvas

self._root — CanvasWindow uses self.parent, not self._root

_sync_scroll — yview_moveto receiving 'moveto' string instead of float
is_tool_result keyword gate — whiterabbit varies wording, gate failed on repeat runs

architecture_notes.canvas_push: RESOLVED — fence intercept in _handle_canvas_push catches all fenced code, no keyword gate
architecture_notes.push_code_from_ethica: Must set state=NORMAL before delete — editor may be in any state
architecture_notes.two_stage_defer: 50ms switch tab, 100ms write — both must be inside _do_push
architecture_notes.self_parent: CanvasWindow root window reference is self.parent — never self._root
architecture_notes.sed_danger: sed multiline replacements break indentation — always use python3 for structural edits
